datasets.name: brent_latest
queryLines:
SELECT
  price_usd_per_barrel
FROM
  danny_catalog.dem_schema.brent_crude_oil_prices
ORDER BY
  date DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: aud_latest
queryLines: SELECT aud_usd as aud_usd_rate FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.conflict_scenario_overlay ORDER BY scenario_date DESC LIMIT 1

datasets.name: opec_latest
queryLines: SELECT country, value_tbpd FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.opec_production_by_country WHERE period = (SELECT MAX(period) FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.opec_production_by_country) AND value_tbpd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value_tbpd DESC

datasets.name: iran_share
queryLines:
SELECT ROUND(
        (SELECT value_tbpd FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.opec_production_by_country WHERE country='Iran' AND period=(SELECT MAX(period) FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.opec_production_by_country))
        / (SELECT SUM(value_tbpd) FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.opec_production_by_country WHERE period=(SELECT MAX(period) FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.opec_production_by_country))
        * 100, 1
    ) as iran_pct

datasets.name: imports_by_country
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(Source_country), '') = '' THEN 'Unknown'
    ELSE TRIM(Source_country)
  END as source_country,
  ROUND(SUM(`Crude_oil_&_other_refinery_feedstocks_ML`), 1) as import_volume_ml
FROM
  danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
WHERE
  `Crude_oil_&_other_refinery_feedstocks_ML` IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  1
HAVING
  SUM(`Crude_oil_&_other_refinery_feedstocks_ML`) > 0
ORDER BY
  import_volume_ml DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: iea_days
queryLines: SELECT * FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_iea_days_coverage

datasets.name: iea_latest
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_iea_days_coverage

datasets.name: oecd_prices
queryLines: SELECT * FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_fuel_prices_oecd

datasets.name: wholesale_by_city
queryLines:
SELECT city, fuel_type, ROUND(AVG(price_cpl), 1) as avg_price_cpl
    FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.aip_terminal_gate_prices
    WHERE year_period = (SELECT MAX(year_period) FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.aip_terminal_gate_prices)
    GROUP BY city, fuel_type
    ORDER BY city

datasets.name: cpi_fuel
queryLines:
SELECT phase, day_number, adelaide_ulp_cpl, brent_usd_bbl, aud_usd
    FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.conflict_scenario_overlay
    ORDER BY day_number

datasets.name: aud_trend
queryLines: SELECT scenario_date as date, aud_usd as aud_usd_rate FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.conflict_scenario_overlay ORDER BY scenario_date

datasets.name: adelaide_ulp
queryLines:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(price_cpl), 1) as price_cpl
    FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.aip_terminal_gate_prices
    WHERE city = 'Adelaide' AND fuel_type = 'ULP'
      AND year_period = (SELECT MAX(year_period) FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.aip_terminal_gate_prices)

datasets.name: sales_by_state
queryLines: SELECT * FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_sales_by_state_national

datasets.name: sales_state_agg
queryLines:
SELECT source_sheet, COUNT(*) as record_count
    FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_sales_by_state_national
    GROUP BY source_sheet
    ORDER BY record_count DESC

datasets.name: nger_top15
queryLines:
SELECT Organisation_name,
        CAST(REPLACE(`Total_scope_1_emissions_t_CO2-e`, ',', '') AS BIGINT) as scope1_tonnes
    FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.nger_corporate_emissions
    WHERE `Total_scope_1_emissions_t_CO2-e` != ''
    ORDER BY scope1_tonnes DESC
    LIMIT 15

datasets.name: power_by_fuel
queryLines:
SELECT Primary_fuel, COUNT(*) as station_count
    FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.nger_electricity_sector
    WHERE Primary_fuel IS NOT NULL AND Primary_fuel != ''
    GROUP BY Primary_fuel
    ORDER BY station_count DESC

datasets.name: power_count
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.nger_electricity_sector

datasets.name: refineries
queryLines: SELECT * FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.fuel_infrastructure_refineries

datasets.name: refinery_count
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.fuel_infrastructure_refineries WHERE status = 'Operational'

datasets.name: terminals
queryLines: SELECT * FROM danny_catalog.dem_schema.fuel_infrastructure_terminals

datasets.name: imports_by_product
queryLines:
SELECT
  product_type,
  ROUND(SUM(volume_ml), 1) as total_ml
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      'Crude Oil & Feedstocks' as product_type,
      SUM(`Crude_oil_&_other_refinery_feedstocks_ML`) as volume_ml
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'LPG',
      SUM(LPG_ML)
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Automotive Gasoline',
      SUM(Automotive_gasoline_ML)
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Aviation Fuel',
      SUM(Aviation_turbine_fuel_ML) + SUM(Aviation_gasoline_ML)
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Diesel Oil',
      SUM(Diesel_oil_ML)
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Fuel Oil',
      SUM(Fuel_oil_ML)
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Bitumen',
      SUM(Bitumen_ML)
    FROM
      danny_catalog.dem_schema.petroleum_imports_by_country
  ) t
WHERE
  volume_ml IS NOT NULL
  AND volume_ml > 0
GROUP BY
  product_type
ORDER BY
  total_ml DESC

datasets.name: brent_historical
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', date) AS ds,
  AVG(price_usd_per_barrel) AS brent_price
FROM
  danny_catalog.dem_schema.brent_crude_oil_prices
GROUP BY
  1
ORDER BY

datasets.name: brent_forecast
queryLines:
WITH brent_monthly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', date) AS ds,
    AVG(price_usd_per_barrel) AS brent_price
  FROM
    danny_catalog.dem_schema.brent_crude_oil_prices
  GROUP BY
    1
  ORDER BY
    1
),
forecast AS (
  SELECT
    *
  FROM
    AI_FORECAST(
      TABLE(brent_monthly),
      horizon => '2028-01-01',
      time_col => 'ds',
      value_col => 'brent_price',
      prediction_interval_width => 0.95
    )
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(h.ds, f.ds) AS ds,
  h.brent_price,
  f.brent_price_forecast,
  f.brent_price_lower,
  f.brent_price_upper
FROM
  brent_monthly h
    FULL OUTER JOIN forecast f
      ON h.ds = f.ds
ORDER BY

columns.description: Alias for forecast lower bound to match forecast-line widget naming convention.
Alias for forecast upper bound to match forecast-line widget naming convention.

lines: Historical Brent crude prices and OPEC production set the stage. Iran produces 13.6% of OPEC output — a conflict disrupting the Strait of Hormuz would send shockwaves through global energy markets and Australia's fuel supply.

frame.title: Brent Crude Oil — Historical Monthly Price (USD/bbl)
IEA Days of Net Import Coverage
Total Oil Imports by Product Type (ML)

lines: Australia imports around 90% of its refined fuel. With only 50–60 days of IEA coverage — well below the 90-day obligation — a supply disruption leaves the nation critically exposed.

frame.title: Wholesale Fuel Prices by City (c/L, Latest Year)
OECD Fuel Prices — Australia vs Peers (c/L)

lines: Rising crude prices and a weaker AUD create a double hit on Australian fuel consumers. Wholesale and retail prices surge across all capital cities.

frame.title: Total Fuel Sales by State — Gasoline & Diesel (ML)

lines: Fuel consumption varies dramatically across states. NSW and QLD consume the most gasoline and diesel, making them most vulnerable to supply disruptions.

frame.title: Power Stations by Primary Fuel Type

lines: Australia's industrial base and power generation depend heavily on fossil fuels. A fuel crisis cascades through mining, freight, and electricity generation.
With only 4 operational refineries and a network of import terminals, Australia's fuel infrastructure has limited redundancy against supply chain shocks.
## Brent Crude Oil — Price & AI Forecast
Historical monthly Brent crude prices from FRED (1987–2026) alongside an AI-generated forecast to January 2028 with 95% prediction intervals.
